items.description:
𝘖𝘳𝘪𝘨𝘪𝘯𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘺 𝘢 𝘱𝘦𝘳𝘴𝘰𝘯𝘢𝘭 𝘪𝘵𝘦𝘮, 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘢𝘤𝘤𝘦𝘴𝘴𝘰𝘳𝘺 𝘸𝘢𝘴 𝘱𝘶𝘵 𝘰𝘯-𝘴𝘢𝘭𝘦 𝘧𝘳𝘰𝘮 𝘪𝘯𝘲𝘶𝘪𝘳𝘺. 6-2-25
────────────────────────────────
The farther someone goes into the "floating-point," the more jagged things tend to become. Sometimes, it is just a visual affliction. Unfortunately, it can lead to more gruesome results. Giving up halfway and returning from there will bring such abnormalities with them. To go further would make things worse.

items.name: Y2K Studded DC Double Rhinestone Scene Belt Black
items.description:
𝕄𝕒𝕟𝕪 𝕠𝕥𝕙𝕖𝕣 𝕣𝕖𝕔𝕠𝕝𝕠𝕣𝕤 𝕒𝕣𝕖 𝕒𝕧𝕒𝕚𝕝𝕒𝕓𝕝𝕖 𝕚𝕟 𝕞𝕪 𝕘𝕣𝕠𝕦𝕡!
Join Group = https://www.roblox.com/communities/14477611

Step into the 2000s McBling era with this bold, studded stacked belt, featuring silver and white rhinestones for the perfect mix of glam and edge. Designed for true Y2K trendsetters, scene queens, and gyaru fashion lovers, this belt is the ultimate black-and-white statement piece. Whether you're rocking a scene or emo aesthetic or adding a touch of vintage luxury to your fit, this belt brings that iconic early 2000s energy. Shine bright, stand out, and own the look!

items.name: Regular Carpet
items.description: You walk past a rug shop, where a clerk tries to sell you a magic carpet.  You tell him you don't want a magic carpet today. He then admits to you that he was lying, and this really is just a regular carpet. His whole life is a lie. Then he starts crying. You kind of have to buy it after that.  This is a regular carpet and it literally does nothing.
